spec.description: Prompt + completion tokens per model, stacked. More directly meaningful than Flux which is an abstracted billing unit.
spec.title: Total Tokens by Model

spec.description: auth_failures / auth_attempts; high values mean credential stuffing or upstream OAuth breakage.
spec.title: Auth Failure Rate %

spec.description: Sum of active WS connections across all instances.
spec.title: WS Connections Active

spec.description: WebSocket throughput in both directions.
spec.title: WS Messages I/O

spec.description: Chat messages persisted to chat sync (chats.pushMessages).
spec.title: Chat Messages Rate

spec.description: Like / unlike / bookmark / unbookmark actions on characters.
spec.title: Character Engagement

spec.description: All Stripe webhook events grouped by event.type.
spec.title: Stripe Events by Type

spec.description: Subscription lifecycle events (created/updated/deleted).
spec.title: Subscription Events by Type

spec.description: invoice.payment_failed events. Spikes mean dunning storms or card decline cascades.
spec.title: Payment Failures

spec.description: Checkouts completed / created over the dashboard time range. Drops can flag price-page bugs or payment-method outages.
spec.title: Checkout Conversion

spec.description: Flux added to user balances, broken down by source: stripe.checkout / stripe.invoice / promo / admin grants.
spec.title: Flux Credited by Source

spec.description: Real revenue per second, in major currency unit (cents -> dollars / equivalent). Always grouped by currency — cross-currency sums are meaningless.
spec.title: Stripe Revenue Rate (major unit/s)

spec.description: Flux that should have been debited but wasn't (debit failure after streaming response sent). Real revenue leak — anything above 0 sustained should page.
spec.title: Flux Unbilled (revenue leak)

spec.description: Streaming responses that died mid-flight. `before_first_chunk` = upstream blew up before any token; `mid_stream` = partial delivery.
spec.title: Stream Interruptions

spec.description: Time from request start to first streamed token (TTFB). Tracks streaming chat experience independently from total operation duration.
spec.title: First Token P95 Latency

spec.description: TTS input characters processed per second — billing base before whole-Flux rounding. Spikes here without proportional flux_consumed = debt accumulating in Redis.
spec.title: TTS Chars Rate

spec.description: Pre-flight rejections from flux-meter assertCanAfford. Volume here = users hitting paywall before upstream call.
spec.title: TTS Preflight Rejections

spec.description: Resend accepted emails by template (verification / password_reset / magic_link / change_email / delete_account).
spec.title: Email Send Rate

spec.description: Email failures / total attempts. >5% means Resend / DNS / suppression list issues blocking auth flows.
spec.title: Email Failure Rate %

spec.description: Requests denied by rate limiter, broken down by route + key type (user vs ip). Sustained ip-keyed traffic = unauthenticated abuse / scraping.
spec.title: Rate Limit Blocked
